metadata.description: azd environment name — all resource names are derived from this value
Azure region for all resources

Notebook profile that controls which Azure resources are provisioned.
core     (Days 3-4)  : Storage, Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Search
standard (Days 5-7)  : core + PostgreSQL, Content Safety, Cosmos DB, ADF
full     (Days 8-10) : standard + ACR, Key Vault, ACA environment, Log Analytics,
                       Application Insights, Azure Machine Learning
advanced (Days 11-14): full + VNet, Private Endpoints, Private DNS, Service Bus
Entra object ID of the PostgreSQL Entra admin (required when profile is standard or above)
Entra display name or UPN of the PostgreSQL Entra admin
Name of the Azure OpenAI chat deployment
Azure OpenAI model identifier (e.g. gpt-4o). Leave empty to skip automatic deployment creation
Azure OpenAI model version to pin (e.g. 2024-11-20). Leave empty to skip pinning
Azure OpenAI REST API version surfaced to notebooks as AZURE_OPENAI_API_VERSION
Primary region
Storage account name
Blob container name for source documents
Search service name
Starter search index name for Day 0
Microsoft Foundry resource name
OpenAI-compatible API version exported into the local environment
OpenAI-compatible chat deployment name exported into the local environment
Optional OpenAI-compatible chat model name for automatic deployment creation
Optional OpenAI-compatible chat model version for automatic deployment creation
Optional chat deployment SKU name
Optional chat deployment capacity
